economic_notes: Related party limited partnerships include: Gambler Resources LP, Gambler Gaming Ventures LP, Gambler Construction LP, Gambler Brandon Ventures LP, Gambler Gas & Convenience Store LP. Long-term investments in Gambler Development Ltd. and Gambler Management Ltd.
notes: Net financial position is a net debt of $2,283,717. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $5,886,245 + CMHC $89,049 + First Peoples Development Inc. $28,795 = $6,004,089.
